spec.title: Permission constant and migration drift guard

humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 blockers. The verifier now ignores commented-out migration registrations and requires the named grants-table permission constraint. A residual P2 false-positive risk remains because SQL migration text is scanned without stripping SQL comments.

findings.title: Permission constraint verifier scans SQL comments
findings.description: The repaired verifier structurally parses live migration registrations and requires the intended grants-table constraint, but the SQL constraint scan still operates on raw SQL text. A block-commented exact ALTER TABLE statement could be counted as the latest permission constraint.

evidence.detail: Final re-audit confirmed commented-out migration registrations no longer count, but noted that SQL block comments are not stripped before scanning permission constraints.

node packages/itotori-db/scripts/verify-permission-constraints.mjs, node --test packages/itotori-db/scripts/verify-permission-constraints.test.mjs, pnpm --filter @itotori/db test, and node scripts/spec-dag.mjs validate passed after the P1 repairs.

findings.impact: The required SHARED-014 drift guard is now effective for registered migrations and the intended constraint, but a future migration containing a commented exact grants constraint could create a false-positive verifier pass.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: The permission constraint verifier ignores SQL line and block comments before extracting permission constraints.
A registered migration with a block-commented exact grants permission constraint does not satisfy the verifier.
Regression tests cover block comments, line comments, and the existing unrelated permission-shaped check case.

proposedDagNode.title: SQL-comment-aware permission constraint verifier
proposedDagNode.summary: Harden the permission migration drift verifier so SQL line comments and block comments cannot satisfy the named grants-table permission constraint scan.
deliverables: SQL comment stripping or parser-backed constraint extraction for permission drift verification
Regression fixtures for block-commented and line-commented grants constraints
Updated verifier diagnostics that identify the live migration and constraint source
acceptanceCriteria: A block-commented exact grants permission constraint in a registered migration does not satisfy the verifier.
A line-commented exact grants permission constraint in a registered migration does not satisfy the verifier.
The existing registered-migration and named grants-table constraint regressions keep passing.
auditFocus: False-positive drift verification from SQL comments
Constraint diagnostics that hide the source migration
